languages.text: "Хм..." {n}Полковник ворчит, как потревоженный зверь и вдруг выпрямляется, салютуя вашему предку.{/n} "Все, кто вызывает мою ненависть, мертвы, Ваша Светлость. А вы — спаситель моего народа. Я буду защищать вас даже ценой жизни, чтобы вы помнили: люди Заркова не забывают добро даже спустя сотни лет".
languages.translation_comment:
В начале Куя Иждриг салютует.
В конце куя Иждриг отходит.

traits.locale_text: "Хм..." {n}Полковник ворчит, как потревоженный зверь и вдруг выпрямляется, салютуя вашему предку.{/n} "Все, кто вызывает мою ненависть, мертвы, Ваша Светлость. А вы — спаситель моего народа. Я буду защищать вас даже ценой жизни, чтобы вы помнили: люди Заркова не забывают добро даже спустя сотни лет".

languages.translation_comment:
В начале Куя Иждриг салютует.
В конце куя Иждриг отходит.

languages.text: "Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."
languages.original_text: "Хм..." {n}Полковник ворчит, как потревоженный зверь и вдруг выпрямляется, салютуя вашему предку.{/n} "Все, кто вызывает мою ненависть, мертвы, Ваша Светлость. А вы — спаситель моего народа. Я буду защищать вас даже ценой жизни, чтобы вы помнили: люди Заркова не забывают добро даже спустя сотни лет".

I shall protect you even at the cost of my life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

"Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

languages.text: "Hmm ..." {n}Der Colonel knurrt wie ein aufgeschrecktes Tier, ehe er plötzlich Haltung annimmt und deinem Ahnherrn salutiert.{/n} "Alle, die ich hasse, sind tot, Eure Lordschaft. Ihr seid der Erlöser meiner Leute. Ich werde Euch mit meinem Leben schützen, damit Ihr Euch erinnert: Die Leute von Zarkov vergessen eine gute Tat selbst nach Jahrhunderten nicht."
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

traits.locale_text: "Hmm ..." {n}Der Colonel knurrt wie ein aufgeschrecktes Tier, ehe er plötzlich Haltung annimmt und deinem Ahnherrn salutiert.{/n} "Alle, die ich hasse, sind tot, Eure Lordschaft. Ihr seid der Erlöser meiner Leute. Ich werde Euch mit meinem Leben schützen, damit Ihr Euch erinnert: Die Leute von Zarkov vergessen eine gute Tat selbst nach Jahrhunderten nicht."

languages.text: « Hmm... » {n}Le colonel grogne comme un animal qu'on aurait dérangé, puis se redresse brusquement et salue votre ancêtre.{/n} « Tous les gens que je déteste sont morts, Votre Seigneurie. Vous êtes le sauveur de mon peuple. Je vous protégerai au prix de ma propre vie, ne serait-ce que pour vous rappeler que le peuple de Zarkov n'oublie jamais une bonne action, même après des siècles. »
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

traits.locale_text: « Hmm... » {n}Le colonel grogne comme un animal qu'on aurait dérangé, puis se redresse brusquement et salue votre ancêtre.{/n} « Tous les gens que je déteste sont morts, Votre Seigneurie. Vous êtes le sauveur de mon peuple. Je vous protégerai au prix de ma propre vie, ne serait-ce que pour vous rappeler que le peuple de Zarkov n'oublie jamais une bonne action, même après des siècles. »

languages.text: «Mmm...». {n}El coronel gruñe como una bestia molesta, pero de pronto se endereza y se cuadra ante tu antepasado.{/n} «Todos aquellos a los que odio han muerto ya, milord. Usted salvó a mi gente. Lo protegeré aunque me cueste la vida, para que recuerde esto: la gente de Zarkov no olvida un favor, aunque pasen siglos».
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

traits.locale_text: «Mmm...». {n}El coronel gruñe como una bestia molesta, pero de pronto se endereza y se cuadra ante tu antepasado.{/n} «Todos aquellos a los que odio han muerto ya, milord. Usted salvó a mi gente. Lo protegeré aunque me cueste la vida, para que recuerde esto: la gente de Zarkov no olvida un favor, aunque pasen siglos».

languages.text: "Hım..." {n}Albay, rahatsız edilmiş bir hayvan gibi hırlıyor, sonra aniden doğrulup atana selam veriyor.{/n} "Nefret ettiğim herkes öldü Lord Hazretleri. Siz halkımın kurtarıcısısınız. Zarkov halkının yüzyıllar sonra bile iyilikleri unutmadığını bilmeniz için sizi kendi hayatım pahasına bile koruyacağım."
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

traits.locale_text: "Hım..." {n}Albay, rahatsız edilmiş bir hayvan gibi hırlıyor, sonra aniden doğrulup atana selam veriyor.{/n} "Nefret ettiğim herkes öldü Lord Hazretleri. Siz halkımın kurtarıcısısınız. Zarkov halkının yüzyıllar sonra bile iyilikleri unutmadığını bilmeniz için sizi kendi hayatım pahasına bile koruyacağım."

languages.text: “嗯……”{n}上校像被激怒的野兽一样低吼一声，随后猛然挺直身子，向你的先祖敬礼。{/n}“我憎恶的人都已经死了，大人。您是我族人的救星。我会护您周全，哪怕搭上自己的性命，这样您便会记住，扎尔科夫人不会忘记任何善举，哪怕隔了几个世纪。”
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."

traits.locale_text: “嗯……”{n}上校像被激怒的野兽一样低吼一声，随后猛然挺直身子，向你的先祖敬礼。{/n}“我憎恶的人都已经死了，大人。您是我族人的救星。我会护您周全，哪怕搭上自己的性命，这样您便会记住，扎尔科夫人不会忘记任何善举，哪怕隔了几个世纪。”

languages.text: 「うーん…」{n}その大佐は怒った獣のように唸り、そして突然姿勢を正して祖先に向かって敬礼する。「憎むべき者は皆死んだ、貴様。我らの救世主だ。我は自らの命を犠牲にしてでも貴様を守り、貴様は忘れないでほしい。ザルコフの人々は、何世紀経っても善意を忘れない。」{/n}
languages.original_text: "Hmm..." {n}The colonel growls like a disturbed beast, then suddenly straightens and salutes your ancestor.{/n} "All those I hate are dead, Your Lordship. You are the saviour of my people. I will protect you even at the cost of my own life, so that you may remember: the people of Zarkov do not forget a good deed, even centuries later."
